top_signals.title: Airbus Wins Major Order from Air China to Cement Regional Hold
top_signals.summary: Airbus SE won an order from Air China for 15 A350-900 widebody aircraft as well as 40 A320neo series for its Shenzhen Airlines subsidiary, with a total transaction value of about $12.4 billion, according to a filing to Shanghai stock exchange.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Parliament extends current session through July 25
top_signals.summary: The extension will allow further discussion on a bill to establish the concept of a secondary capital.
